title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 6.3e
sections: KOG’MAW, THE MOUTH OF THE ABYSS
paragraphs: This patch we have a couple of balance changes across the map and the release of Kog’Maw! AKA the cutest and slightly grossest champion to join the Rift yet! We also have some new entries to the AnimaTech skinline. Welcome to Patch 6.3e!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Belched forth from a rotting Void incursion deep in the wastelands of Icathia, Kog’Maw is an inquisitive yet putrid creature with a caustic, gaping mouth. This particular Void-spawn needs to gnaw and drool on anything within reach to truly understand it. Though not inherently evil, Kog’Maw’s beguiling naiveté is dangerous, as it often precedes a feeding frenzy—not for sustenance, but to satisfy its unending curiosity.
Kog’Maw will be released on December 11 at 00:01 UTC.

Yuumi has been struggling in the laning phase compared to other supports, since her rework, so we’re increasing some of her early game power. Evelynn’s clear is getting sinfully smoother, she’ll be able to charm camps before they even know what hit them. Kalista is also getting a power-up in this patch so she can stick the landing with her allies. We also have been keeping an eye on Nidalee since her launch and we’re going to be declawing some of her damage. Teemo’s shrooms are now also slightly less explosive, and Morgana’s spell spam has been cursed, so she won’t be able to throw out as many pools of darkness. And last but not least, we’re reining in some of Vayne’s mobility.
Health Regen：25 + Champion Level × 7 + 25% Ability Power →  60 + Champion Level × 7 + 25% Ability Power
Best Friend’s attack with Bonus Damage: 10/12/14/16/18 → 14/16/18/20/22
Base Damage per spear after the first: 12/20/28/36 → 12/22/32/42
Cougar Form Bonus Armor and Magic Resistance: 2 + 1 × champion level + 2.5% Ability Power → 2 + 1 × champion level + 3% Ability Power
Bonus Damage: 55% Ability Power  → 50% Ability Power
Detonation Bonus Damage: 30% Ability Power  → 25% Ability Power
Bonus Damage over time: 30% Ability Power  → 25% Ability Power
For each instance that Soul Siphon triggers, Tormented Shadow’s remaining cooldown is reduced by 5%  → 3.5% total cooldown.

Tanky boots and enchants are getting trimmed down along with Bloodthirster which has been a dominant first-item choice for marksmen. Death’s Dance and Magnetic Blaster also get tuned in for fairer fights. Rylai’s slow and general item polish were adjusted so that there could be a smoother, more balanced gameplay experience.
Vampiric Scepter (1200 Gold) + Cloak of Agility (1000 Gold) + 900 → Vampiric Scepter (1200 Gold) + Cloak of Agility (1000 Gold) + Ruby Crystal (500 Gold) + 300
Duration for Gained Attack Speed and Bonus Movement Speed: 3s → 6s
Physical Damage and Magic Damage stored: 30% → 27%
Damage stored for Ranged champions unchanged.
Reduce incoming Magic Damage from champions by: 3% ~ 12% → 3% ~ 10%
Reduce incoming Physical Damage from champions by: 3% ~ 10% →  3% ~ 9%
Base Shield: 20% Maximum Health → 15% Maximum Health
Shield cap scaling with champion’s Armor/MR: 35% Maximum Health → 28% Maximum Health
For every enemy nearby, Bonus Shield cap scaling with champion’s Armor/MR: 12% Maximum Health → 10% Maximum Health
